feature.name: Source/include/omit selection
feature.description: Extract coverage.py InOrOut logic that decides whether a file should be measured based on source, include, and omit settings.
included_behaviors: apply run include and omit glob patterns after source scoping
exclude stdlib, third-party, and coverage.py paths when no source is set
return human-readable skip reasons for rejected files
excluded_behaviors: plugin file tracers and dynamic source filenames
configuration file discovery beyond constructing a config object

entanglement.description: File selection combines config values, glob/tree/module matchers, interpreter install paths, and import state across many modules.
signals: InOrOut matcher graph built from config and runtime paths
third-party and stdlib heuristics tied to sys.path

output.signature: SourceSelector(...).skip_reason(filename: str, modulename: str | None = None) -> str | None
